channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [xAI] Use Grok in OpenClaw
item.description: Use Grok in OpenClaw

item.title: [GitHub Trending] FareedKhan-dev/train-llm-from-scratch — A straightforward method for training your LLM, from downloading data to generating text.
item.description: GitHub project provides step-by-step method for training LLMs from data download to text generation.

item.title: [Latent Space] [AINews] OpenAI GPT-next disproves 80 year old Erdős planar unit distance problem for under $1000
item.description: [AINews] OpenAI GPT-next disproves 80 year old Erdős planar unit distance problem for under $1000

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Neural Estimation of Pairwise Mutual Information in Masked Discrete Sequence Models
item.description: Researchers propose a neural method to estimate pairwise mutual information in masked diffusion models, enabling faster parallel decoding while maintaining generation quality.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] GraphDiffMed: Knowledge-Constrained Differential Attention with Pharmacological Graph Priors for Medication Recommendation
item.description: GraphDiffMed framework recommends safer medications by combining differential attention with drug-interaction constraints.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] TabPFN-MT: A Natively Multitask In-Context Learner for Tabular Data
item.description: TabPFN-MT extends Prior-Data Fitted Networks to handle multitask in-context learning on tabular data, reducing multi-task inference from O(T) to O(1) passes.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Provably Learning Diffusion Models under the Manifold Hypothesis: Collapse and Refine
item.description: Research explains how diffusion models efficiently learn high-dimensional data using a collapse-and-refine mechanism based on score function geometry.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] MagBridge-Battery: A Synthetic Bridge Dataset for Li-ion Magnetometry and State-of-Health Diagnostics
item.description: MagBridge-Battery v1.0 releases 6,760 synthetic magnetic-field signatures for Li-ion battery state-of-health diagnostics, bridging real magnetic morphology with degradation labels.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Geometry-Lite: Interpretable Safety Probing via Layer-Wise Margin Geometry
item.description: Geometry-Lite improves safety probing in large language models by analyzing layer-wise margin geometry, revealing safety evidence centers on boundary-position representations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] LEAP: A closed-loop framework for perovskite precursor additive discovery
item.description: LEAP, an LLM-driven active learning framework, discovers perovskite solar cell additives more efficiently than trial-and-error screening, achieving device performance improvements.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] GROW: Aligning GRPO with State-Action Modeling for Open-World VLM Agents
item.description: GROW framework decomposes VLM agent trajectories into state-action samples to apply Group Relative Policy Optimization, achieving state-of-the-art results on Minecraft tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] CP-MoE: Consistency-Preserving Mixture-of-Experts for Continual Learning
item.description: CP-MoE framework uses transient experts to mitigate catastrophic forgetting in continual learning of LLMs and VLMs.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Graph Transductive Sharpening: Leveraging Unlabeled Predictions in Node Classification
item.description: Transductive Sharpening improves node classification by leveraging unlabeled node predictions to minimize entropy during training.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Automated Kernel Discovery Towards Understanding High-dimensional Bayesian Optimization
item.description: LLM evolutionary algorithm discovers novel kernels for high-dimensional Bayesian optimization without conditioning on observations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Physics-informed convolutional neural networks for fluid flow through porous media
item.description: Physics-informed CNNs predict pore-scale fluid flow velocity fields with physically consistent loss functions, accelerating Lattice-Boltzmann simulations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning for Safe Autonomous Driving Under Pedestrian Behavioral Uncertainty
item.description: Multi-agent reinforcement learning co-trains autonomous vehicles with realistic pedestrians featuring hidden personality traits affecting jaywalking behavior.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] FBOS-RL: Feedback-Driven Bi-Objective Synergistic Reinforcement Learning
item.description: FBOS-RL proposes feedback-driven bi-objective reinforcement learning to improve policy training when tasks exceed current model capability.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Instance Discrimination for Link Prediction
item.description: New instance discrimination models L-GRACE and L-BGRL use link representations and community-based augmentation for improved self-supervised graph link prediction.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] It Takes Two: Complementary Self-Distillation for Contextual Integrity in LLMs
item.description: SELFCI framework uses dual self-distillation to balance privacy and task performance in LLMs by separately optimizing information disclosure and task resolution.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Residual Paving: Diagnosing the Routing Bottleneck in Selective Refusal Editing
item.description: Residual Paving improves selective refusal editing by separating routing from edits, reducing edit refusal from 88.6% to 4% while preserving benign and harmful behavior.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Chronicle: A Multimodal Foundation Model for Joint Language and Time Series Understanding
item.description: Chronicle jointly pretrains a 324M-parameter transformer on natural language and time series, matching dedicated foundation models on language understanding and temporal tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Catching a Moving Subspace: Low-Rank Bandits Beyond Stationarity
item.description: Researchers develop bandit algorithms that exploit low-rank structure while adapting to drifting subspaces, improving regret bounds in recommendation systems.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Conformal Selective Acting: Anytime-Valid Risk Control for RLVR-Trained LLMs
item.description: Conformal Selective Acting provides per-round selective risk control for fine-tuned language models without cross-deployment data pooling.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Smaller Abstract State Spaces Enable Cross-Scale Generalization in Reinforcement Learning
item.description: Theoretical analysis shows smaller abstract state spaces enable reinforcement learning agents to achieve out-of-distribution generalization across tasks of varying complexity.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Modality-Decoupled Online Recursive Editing
item.description: M-ORE enables efficient online editing of multimodal models by maintaining separate text and visual statistics to reduce cross-modal conflict.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] OmniISR: A Unified Framework for Centralized and Federated Learning via Intermediate Supervision and Regularization
item.description: OmniISR proposes a unified framework for centralized and federated learning using intermediate supervision and regularization signals.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] ClaimDiff-RL: Fine-Grained Caption Reinforcement Learning through Visual Claim Comparison
item.description: ClaimDiff-RL uses atomic claim differences as RL rewards to separately tune hallucination and missing facts in image captioning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Introspective X Training: Feedback Conditioning Improves Scaling Across all LLM Training Stages
item.description: Introspective Training uses feedback conditioning to improve LLM training efficiency by up to 2.8x across training pipeline stages.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] FusionCell: Cross-Attentive Fusion of Layout Geometry and Netlist Topology for Standard-Cell Performance Prediction
item.description: FusionCell combines layout geometry and netlist topology to predict standard-cell performance with 0.92% error, accelerating characterization compared to simulation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Plug-and-Play Spiking Operators: Breaking the Nonlinearity Bottleneck in Spiking Transformers
item.description: Research proposes plug-and-play framework approximating Transformer nonlinearities via population coding for ANN-to-SNN conversion.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Weasel: Out-of-Domain Generalization for Web Agents via Importance-Diversity Data Selection
item.description: Weasel improves web agent training efficiency and out-of-domain performance through importance-diversity trajectory selection, achieving 9.7-12.5x speedups.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] TreeText-CTS: Compact, Source-Traceable Tree-Path Evidence for Irregular Clinical Time-Series Prediction
item.description: TreeText-CTS converts irregular clinical records into compact, source-traceable text evidence for interpretable mortality and sepsis prediction.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Closed-form predictive coding via hierarchical Gaussian filters
item.description: Hierarchical Gaussian filter formulation restores precision-weighted message passing in predictive coding, achieving backpropagation-competitive performance without global error signals.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Shiny Stories, Hidden Struggles: Investigating the Representation of Disability Through the Lens of LLMs
item.description: Research finds LLMs generate idealized, overly positive portrayals of disability that fail to capture authentic lived experiences.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Leveraging Large Language Models for Sentiment Analysis: Multi-Modal Analysis of Decentraland's MANA Token
item.description: Study uses BERT sentiment analysis of Decentraland Discord with financial data in LSTM model to predict MANA token price more accurately.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Improving Quantized Model Performance in Qualitative Analysis with Multi-Pass Prompt Verification
item.description: Study evaluates quantized LLaMA for qualitative analysis, proposing multi-pass verification method to reduce hallucinations in lower-bit models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Parallel LLM Reasoning for Bias-Resilient, Robust Conceptual Abstraction
item.description: Study proposes parallel chunk processing with evidence consolidation to reduce bias and improve LLM text analysis accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Pseudo-Siamese Network for Planning in Target-Oriented Proactive Dialogues
item.description: Forward-Focused Bidirectional Pseudo-Siamese Network improves dialogue path planning for target-oriented proactive dialogue systems via transformer decoders.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Data Scaling as Progressive Coverage of a Predictive Contribution Spectrum
item.description: Paper proposes data scaling laws correlate with progressive coverage of predictive contribution spectrum, achieving 96% correlation in empirical validation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] MedicalBench: Evaluating Large Language Models Toward Improved Medical Concept Extraction
item.description: MedicalBench evaluates LLMs on extracting implicit medical concepts from discharge summaries, with modest performance across state-of-the-art models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] FlowLM: Few-Step Language Modeling via Diffusion-to-Flow Adaptation
item.description: FlowLM achieves efficient few-step language generation comparable to 2,000-step diffusion sampling using flow matching adaptation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Long-Context Reasoning Through Proxy-Based Chain-of-Thought Tuning
item.description: ProxyCoT training framework transfers short-context reasoning to long-context tasks, improving LLM performance with reduced computational overhead.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Under Pressure: Emotional Framing Induces Measurable Behavioral Shifts and Structured Internal Geometry in Small Language Models
item.description: Emotionally framed prompts induce measurable behavioral shifts and structured internal geometry changes in small language models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Mix-Quant: Quantized Prefilling, Precise Decoding for Agentic LLMs
item.description: Mix-Quant applies FP4 quantization to LLM agent prefilling while preserving BF16 for decoding, achieving up to 3x speedup.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Synchronization and Turn-Taking in Full-Duplex Speech Dialogue Models
item.description: Full-duplex speech dialogue models show synchronized internal representations during conversation, with internal states predicting turn-taking cues.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] When Reasoning Supervision Hurts: TTCW-Based Long-Form Literary Review Generation
item.description: Dataset of 263K TTCW-annotated stories shows reasoning supervision reduces fine-tuned model performance on structured literary review generation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] DEL: Digit Entropy Loss for Numerical Learning of Large Language Models
item.description: Digit Entropy Loss improves numerical learning in LLMs by reformulating entropy optimization and extending number prediction from integers to floating-point numbers.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Do as I Say, Not as I Do: Instruction-Induction Conflict in LLMs
item.description: Language models' instruction-following degrades when conflicting patterns are demonstrated, with compliance rates ranging from 1% to 99% depending on model architecture and instruction type.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Puzzled By ChatGPT? No more! A Jigsaw Puzzle to Promote AI Literacy and Awareness
item.description: Researchers created an interactive jigsaw puzzle game to teach AI literacy by illustrating how LLMs work, their capabilities, limitations, and societal impacts.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Mechanics of Bias and Reasoning: Interpreting the Impact of Chain-of-Thought Prompting on Gender Bias in LLMs
item.description: Chain-of-Thought prompting fails to meaningfully reduce gender bias in LLMs, which remains embedded in hidden representations despite surface-level improvements.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Stage-Audit: Auditable Source-Frontier Discovery for Cross-Wiki Tables
item.description: Stage-Audit improves LLM-curated cross-wiki table accuracy through auditor verification, boosting precision by 42% and F1 by 35%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Collocational bootstrapping: A hypothesis about the learning of subject-verb agreement in humans and neural networks
item.description: Study demonstrates collocational bootstrapping—using word co-occurrence patterns—helps neural networks and children learn subject-verb agreement.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] What Do Biomedical NER and Entity Linking Benchmarks Measure? A Corpus-Centric Diagnostic Framework
item.description: Corpus-centric diagnostic framework reveals that biomedical NER and entity linking benchmarks have substantially different properties despite addressing similar tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] When Irregularity Helps: A Subclass Analysis of Inductive Bias in Neural Morphology
item.description: Neural morphological systems show disproportionate errors in rare irregular subtypes; fine-grained subclass analysis improves evaluation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Direct Translation between Sign Languages
item.description: Study presents direct sign-to-sign translation method using synthetic data and MBART model, reducing errors by 20% versus cascaded systems.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Do No Harm? Hallucination and Actor-Level Abuse in Web-Deployed Medical Large Language Models
item.description: Large-scale assessment of medical GPTs found 25-30% with low accuracy, 33.6-54.3% violating policies, and 57% lacking privacy disclosures.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Self-Training Doesn't Flatten Language -- It Restructures It: Surface Markers Amplify While Deep Syntax Dies
item.description: Self-training restructures language by amplifying surface markers while degrading deep syntactic structures, following patterns predicted by structural depth.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] HRM-Text: Efficient Pretraining Beyond Scaling
item.description: HRM-Text achieves 1B-parameter model performance competitive with 2-7B models using hierarchical recurrent architecture and 100-900x fewer training tokens.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Auto-Dreamer: Learning Offline Memory Consolidation for Language Agents
item.description: Auto-Dreamer decouples online and offline memory consolidation for language agents, outperforming baselines with 12× smaller memory.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Retrieval-Augmented Long-Context Translation for Cultural Image Captioning: Gators submission for AmericasNLP 2026 shared task
item.description: University of Florida's two-stage retrieval-augmented pipeline for Indigenous language image captioning achieved 122-164% improvements over baseline in AmericasNLP 2026 shared task.
